eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado 1
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp 1
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف 1
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت 1
eyebrow.zh: 生成式AI素养破解 · 一 年级

chrome.sub: An AI helper made a guess. Is it right? A smart kid always checks. Open four locks to learn how to check a robot.
chrome.briefP: An AI helper is a computer helper that guesses from examples. A guess can be wrong. Read the clues. Then open all four locks. Each lock tells you why.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You learned that an AI helper guesses from examples, that a good way to check is to ask a grown-up or use what you know, that a clear ask helps, and that you read and check before you use it. Great work!

clues.title: From examples
clues.body: An AI helper makes guesses. It learns from many examples it has seen. It is a computer helper, not a living thing.

clues.title: A guess can be wrong
clues.body: An AI helper can sound sure and still be wrong. It is only guessing. So you should always check its answer.

clues.title: How to check
clues.body: You can check a guess. Ask a grown-up. Use what you already know. Look in a book you trust.

clues.title: A clear ask
clues.body: Tell the AI helper what you want in a clear way. A clear ask helps it make a better guess.

clues.title: Look at the answer
clues.body: When the AI helper answers, read it first. Do not just use it. Read, then check if it is right.

clues.title: A slow fact
clues.body: A turtle walks very slowly and carries its shell. That is neat, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: Where Guesses Come From
locks.q: How does an AI helper make its guesses?
options: From many examples it has seen before
It is alive and feels the answer
It magically always knows the truth
locks.reason: An AI helper makes guesses from examples it has seen. It is not alive, and it does not magically know the truth, so it can be wrong.

locks.title: Good Ways to Check
locks.q: Tap EVERY good way to check an AI helper's answer.

items.t: Look it up in a book you trust
Just believe every word it says
Close your eyes and hope it is right

locks.reason: Good ways to check are to ask a grown-up, use what you know, or look in a trusted book. Just believing it or hoping is not checking.

locks.title: Say It Clearly
locks.q: To get a better guess, tell the AI helper what you want in a ______ way.
locks.reason: A clear ask helps the AI helper make a better guess. If your words are clear, its answer will fit what you really want.

locks.title: When It Might Be Wrong
locks.q: The AI helper might be wrong. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.

pads.e: ✅ Check it or ask a grown-up

locks.reason: First READ the answer. Then CHECK it or ask a grown-up. Then USE it only if it is right. Read, Check, Use.
